{{Quote|As alike as bepps.|A common phrase based on the identical nature of bepps|<ref name="CotJ" />}}
'''Bepps''' were a [[Foodstuff/Legends|foodstuff]] created by the [[Bith/Legends|Bith]] [[Species/Legends|species]] through use of [[Cloning/Legends|cloning]]. They were grown in [[Hydroponic vat|hydroponic tanks]] and took the form of pale [[Color/Legends|pink]], precisely six-[[Centimeter/Legends|centimeter]] cubes. Although nutritionally balanced, bepps were flavorless, and,<ref name="CotJ" /> by [[12 ABY/Legends|12 ABY]],<ref name="TERC">''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' dates the events of [[Children of the Jedi (novel)|''Children of the Jedi'']] to [[12 ABY/Legends|12 ABY]].</ref> [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] had yet to encounter anyone who enjoyed eating them. Due to being clones, all bepps were identical, which caused "as alike as bepps" to become a common phrase throughout [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]] by the reign of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]].<ref name="CotJ" />

==Behind the scenes==
Bepps were mentioned in [[Children of the Jedi (novel)|''Children of the Jedi'']], a novel released in [[1995]] by [[Barbara Hambly]].<ref name="CotJ" />

*[[Children of the Jedi (novel)|''Children of the Jedi'']] {{1stm}}
